title: Assessment: Adopt TDD Without Overclaiming It

questions.question: What is the course's best summary of the empirical TDD evidence?

options.A: It proves TDD always improves both speed and quality
options.B: It is mixed and context-sensitive rather than universally decisive
options.C: It shows TDD has no value
options.D: It only matters in Java codebases

questions.explanation: The course's final synthesis is that TDD outcome evidence is mixed and highly sensitive to context and execution quality.

questions.question: Why is mixed evidence not the same as evidence of no value?

options.A: Because mixed evidence still allows conditional benefits in some settings
options.B: Because every mixed study secretly supports TDD strongly
options.C: Because evidence quality does not matter for practice decisions

questions.explanation: Mixed evidence means outcomes vary by context; it does not erase the possibility of meaningful benefit.

questions.question: What should a team do before claiming it uses 'contract tests' as part of its TDD strategy?

options.A: Assume everyone shares the same definition
options.B: Define the exact mechanism because the term is used ambiguously across sources
options.C: Replace all integration tests with the label
options.D: Treat the term as equivalent to any unit mock

questions.explanation: The course closes by making terminology precision part of honest practice.

questions.question: Explain why the course treats open limits and research gaps as operating constraints rather than a weakness to hide.

required_points: Large-system transfer and contract terminology remain uncertain
Teams should make these limits explicit instead of overstating confidence
The right response is local validation and bounded claims
answer_key.full_credit: Shows how honest uncertainty improves practice decisions and protects against overclaiming
answer_key.partial_credit: Mentions gaps but not how they change operating behavior

questions.prompt: A manager wants to roll out TDD company-wide with promised quality and productivity gains. Use Module 7 to rewrite that plan into an evidence-calibrated adoption strategy that is ambitious but honest.
questions.guidance: Strong answers reject universal promises, define local measures, name open limits, and still preserve a practical path for trying TDD well.

rubric.A: Produces a disciplined adoption strategy grounded in mixed evidence and explicit local validation
rubric.B: Adds caution but leaves the measurement or limits vague
rubric.C: Mostly repeats either pro-TDD slogans or skeptical dismissal
